---
title: "Mind Palace"
date: "2026-05-09"
description: "A self-contained HTML visualization — CES data exploration with a paired Python pipeline, distilled into one page that runs anywhere."
categories: [project, visualization, data]
---

A research-grade visualization built around CES (Cooperative Election Study) data, packaged as one self-contained HTML page. The companion Python pipeline shapes the data; the page renders the result.

Download and open locally — no internet connection required after download.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="../mind-palace.html" download="mind-palace.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="../mind-palace.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
